name: Microwave Chicken Teriyaki in a Bag
recipeInstructions:
1. Into the cooking bag, place soy sauce, honey and sherry. Add whole chicken to bag and tie securely. Place the bag into a 2-quart oblong glass baking dish. Refrigerate for 2 hours, turning the bag 2-3 times to allow marinade to reach all surfaces of the chicken.
2. When ready to microwave, cut a slit in the bag near the closure. If using a temperature probe, insert through the slit into the thickest part of the thigh. Avoid touching the bone.
3. Microwave at medium high until temperature reaches 190 degrees Fahrenheit, or about 20 minutes. Check after about 17 minutes as temperature varies. Remove chicken from microwave.
4. Prepare the sauce. Into a 1-quart glass measuring cup, stir together 2 tablespoons water and 1 tablespoon cornstarch. Cut off one corner of the cooking bag and drain juices into the measuring cup with cornstarch and water. Microwave on high power for 2 minutes, stirring after one minute. Sauce should be thick and clear.
5. Chicken should stand in bag for 10 minutes before removing carefully. Place chicken on serving platter. Pour sauce over chicken and serve immediately.
